name: PowerShell Console Host History Log Clearing
description: Detects attempts to remove or clear PowerShell console host history logs, a common defense evasion technique used by adversaries.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious PowerShell command history clearing detected on **{computer_name}**. The user **{user}** executed a command ('`{payload}`') to remove or manipulate PowerShell history logs. This is a high-risk defense evasion tactic that could indicate an attacker attempting to hide their tracks. Immediate investigation is required to determine the context and purpose of this action.

parameters.name: computer_name
parameters.description: The hostname of the computer where the event occurred.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that ran the PowerShell command.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The full script block or command that was executed to clear the history.
